title: 10 Best Sugar Stocks to Buy Now
text: Currently, the world demands more than 180 million metric tons of sugar annually, both by individual shoppers and corporations that require massive amounts of sugar to create their products. title: Archer Daniels Midland (ADM) Surpasses Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Archer Daniels Midland (ADM) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.89 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.59 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.15 per share a year ago.

title: Archer Daniels Midland beats profit views but fell short on revenue, as all business segments saw declines
text: Archer Daniels Midland Co. ADM, +1.18% reported Tuesday second-quarter profit that beat expectations but revenue that fell short, amid softer demand within parts of its nutrition and flavors business. Net income fell to $927 million, or $1.70 a share, from $1.24 billion, or $2.18 a share, in the year-ago period.

title: Archer-Daniels-Midland: The Dividend King Is Turning Up The Heat
text: Archer-Daniels-Midland Company has a massive global footprint in agriculture-related supply chains and a strong dividend track record, making it a cornerstone of dividend portfolios. Archer-Daniels-Midland is focused on automation, organic growth, and decarbonization, creating growth opportunities and flexible capital allocation. The company is well positioned for higher growth, with progress in boosting revenue and margins, as well as opportunities in renewable diesel, nutrition, pet food, and precision fermentation.

title: 7 Stocks to Buy Now if You Still Think a Recession Is Ahead

title: Try These 2 Stocks to Play the Wheat Rally
